brief: Exhibit concept centers on one room as a civic stage: labor meetings, school recitals, and neighborhood organizing all passed through the same hall. The recommended narrative arc moves from artifact context to personal testimony to a final wall on local legacy.
searchSummary: curation notes, object story, room context
whyItMatters: One collection item becomes part of a searchable exhibit.
searchIntro: One collection item becomes part of a searchable exhibit. Search across the seeded records to feel that inside the app.

brief: A third seeded record shows how this app can connect follow-up work, recurring themes, and downstream use without leaving the demo experience.
